raw_consumer_statement: Someone stole my card information and used my card on a website I have never heard of before. The website shows on my statement as woot and the amount that was charged is {$890.00}. I disputed this charge with Citi bank by calling on XX/XX/XXXX and was told that I am 100 % protected by citi and that they cover you from fraud charges. I was the investigation would take 90 days for then to complete but the dispute is still open and just sitting there. They took my temporary credit off too and now this reported to my credit as a balance and I have a minimum payment due with the dispute open for a product or service I never authorised or received. When I call and I called close to 14 times, I am told that either their system is down, they are working on it and they told me I can not get a temporary credit anymore and I just have to wait. My 90 is now up and still no update and the dispute is just sitting there. They keep telling me I'm good and everything is okay, but I still have a balance and a payment due. They are not following their policy and not doing any investigation. I did not ever use my card for any purchase of that amount or on that website.
